title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at VMware India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at VMware India
jsonLd.description:
VMware India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Frontend Developer for our Vijayawada operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About VMware India:
VMware India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in JavaScript

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with VMware India!
